summary: Completed full testing of Subscriptions & Recurring Invoices feature (Gestion des Abonnements). All 10 test scenarios passed. Backend API (12/12 tests passed) and Frontend UI verified with Playwright.

console_warnings.note: React accessibility warning - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: ✅ Feature 1: Login as Gérante (PIN 0000) - Successfully logged in as 'Mères AHOUANDJINOU' with Manager badge
✅ Feature 2: Navigate to 'Abonnements' tab - Tab visible in navigation, click opens subscriptions view
✅ Feature 3: Alerts display (En retard) - Shows 'Alertes (2)' with 'En retard (2)' section listing Canal+ Access - 15 000 F and Internet Orange Business - 25 000 F
✅ Feature 4: Statistics display - Total: 2, Clients: 0, Fournisseurs: 2, Charges Mensuelles: 40 000 F
✅ Feature 5: Subscription cards with category icons - Wifi icon for Internet, TV icon for Canal+, correct colors
✅ Feature 6: 'Nouvel Abonnement' form - Complete form with Type, Catégorie, Nom, Contact, Téléphone, Montant, Fréquence, Dates, Mode de paiement, Notes fields
✅ Feature 7: Create new subscription - Successfully created TEST_Loyer_Boutique (100 000 F), appeared in list with 'Échéance aujourd'hui' status
✅ Feature 8: 'Payer' modal - Opens payment dialog with Montant payé, Date du paiement, Mode de paiement, Notes fields
✅ Feature 9: Filtering - Type dropdown (Tous les types/Clients/Fournisseurs) and Catégorie dropdown (internet, tv, loyer, etc.) working
✅ Feature 10: Detail modal - Clicking card opens 'Détails de l'abonnement' with Type, Montant, Fréquence, Prochaine échéance, and 'Historique des paiements' section
seed_data_existing: 2 subscriptions pre-exist: Internet Orange Business (25 000 F) and Canal+ Access (15 000 F), both supplier type, both overdue
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Loyer_Boutique during testing - cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscriptions feature fully working. Gérante can: (1) View all subscriptions with alerts for overdue/upcoming items, (2) Create new subscriptions with full form, (3) Record payments via 'Payer' button, (4) View subscription details and payment history, (5) Edit and delete subscriptions, (6) Filter by type (client/supplier) and category (internet, tv, loyer, etc.). Stats automatically update. Category icons correctly displayed (Wifi, TV, Home, etc.).

login.notes: PIN 0000 logs in as Gérante with Manager badge

abonnements_tab.notes: Tab visible in navigation second row, displays full subscriptions management interface

alerts_section.notes: Shows 'Alertes (X)' with En retard (red), Aujourd'hui (orange), and Prochains 3 jours (amber) sections

stats_cards.notes: 4 cards: Total Abonnements, Clients, Fournisseurs, Charges Mensuelles - auto-updates when data changes

subscription_cards.notes: Card shows: category icon, name, contact, badge (Fournisseur/Client), montant, fréquence, prochaine échéance, status (En retard de X jour(s)/Échéance aujourd'hui)

nouvel_abonnement_form.notes: Complete form: Type dropdown (Client/Fournisseur), Catégorie dropdown (internet/tv/loyer/electricite/eau/telephone/assurance/autre), Nom, Contact, Téléphone, Montant, Fréquence, Date de début, Prochaine échéance, Mode de paiement, Notes

create_subscription.notes: Creates subscription, shows success toast 'Abonnement créé avec succès', refreshes list

payment_modal.notes: Shows subscription name/contact, Montant payé (prefilled), Date du paiement, Mode de paiement dropdown, Notes field

filters.notes: Type filter (Tous les types/Clients/Fournisseurs) and Catégorie filter (Toutes catégories + all categories)

detail_modal.notes: Shows category icon, name, contact, Type, Montant, Fréquence, Prochaine échéance, Historique des paiements section, Fermer + Enregistrer un paiement buttons

edit_delete.notes: Edit (pencil) and Delete (trash) buttons on each card, Edit opens form prefilled

backend_api_tests.GET /api/subscriptions/{id}: PASS - Returns subscription with payment history
